headline: Assessing Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Willis Towers Watson (WTW) is back on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock now around US$289.90 and showing mixed short term and longer term return patterns. See our latest analysis for Willis Towers Watson. At around US$289.90, Willis Towers Watson’s 1 day share price return of 0.22% comes after a softer patch. The 90 day share price return shows a decline of 10.96%, which contrasts with a 3 year total shareholder return of 37.10%. This suggests that recent...
